subcodes.first_line: O thou verdant branch of the Tree of Martyrdom! Thy detailed letter was perused, but in no wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع النضیر من شجره الشهاده نامه مفصل آنجناب ملاحظه گردید ولی بهیچوجه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
